indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed is large and takes up a significant portion of the room, leaving limited space for computer work.

indicators.name: floor-wood
indicators.rationale: The wooden floor provides a warm and comfortable surface to place a laptop.

indicators.name: cabinet-merged
indicators.rationale: The cabinet is merged with the wall, indicating it might not be easily accessible for computer work.

indicators.name: rug-merged
indicators.rationale: The rug is merged with the floor, suggesting it might not be easily moved for computer work.

indicators.name: wall-other-merged
indicators.rationale: The wall is merged with other objects, indicating it might not be easily used for computer work.

indicators.name: chair
indicators.rationale: The chair is designed for comfort and can be used as a desk chair for computer work.

indicators.name: light
indicators.rationale: There is a lamp providing sufficient lighting for computer work.

indicators.name: window-other
indicators.rationale: The window is merged with other objects, indicating it might not be easily used for computer work.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo) due to the large bed taking up most of the room, but has positive aspects such as a comfortable chair and sufficient lighting.
